patch.value:
## Context
2026-07-04 metadata-utilization scan: 33 of 39 active items have an empty `body`, and most non-epic items have zero comments. Stefan's directive: ALL pm item metadata surfaces (body, comments, AC, deps, linked files/tests/docs, risk/confidence, resolution fields) must be fully utilized — a fresh agent must be able to rebuild its entire working context from the pm CLI alone, with no reliance on chat history, agent memory, or git archaeology.

## Scope
For every ACTIVE item (open/in_progress), backfill:
- `body`: full investigation/design narrative — root cause, constraints, alternatives considered, current state, evidence pointers. Descriptions stay as the one-paragraph summary; bodies carry the depth.
- `pm comments`: decision/handoff-shaped context where it exists (review findings, mid-work decisions, session handoffs).
- `risk`/`confidence` where meaningful; `pm deps` edges where items interact; linked files/tests/docs for every artifact the item touches.

Empty-body items as of scan: pm-3wsi, pm-mpbb, pm-o2kc, pm-ydp6, pm-5k4v, pm-8jdc, pm-5oj5, pm-u9d0, pm-ugqx, pm-dj98, pm-7zs0, pm-e9zh, pm-j8z6, pm-qt5d, pm-lt6n, pm-96wm, pm-28cf, pm-z5nb, pm-rj3w, pm-ghf1, pm-bgcu, pm-khdq, pm-jt3b, pm-ueuq, pm-gdi7, pm-jqd2, pm-92if, pm-b3e9, pm-llrp, pm-zwib, pm-ixoa, pm-l98s, pm-f4yn, pm-esbt.

## Constraints
- Active items only — do NOT touch closed items (changelog buckets by updated_at; renames/edits drag them into [Unreleased]).
- Source each body from live verification (code, git history, session topic memory, GH issues/PRs), never from guesswork; concurrency trio pm-bgcu/pm-khdq/pm-zwib should carry the 2026-07-03 audit repro details.
- This is tracker-only work; keep it out of unrelated code PRs.
Backfill full-context bodies (and comments/deps/risk) on all active items so context is rebuildable from pm CLI alone

Metadata-utilization pass: 33/39 active items have empty bodies. Backfill body (design/investigation narrative), comments (decisions/handoffs), deps, risk/confidence, and linked artifacts on every active item per the 'project management = context management' philosophy — a fresh agent must rebuild full context using only the pm CLI.

Every active (open/in_progress) item has a non-empty body carrying its full investigation/design context; items with cross-item interactions have pm deps edges; risk/confidence set where meaningful; no closed items are mutated; spot-check confirms a fresh agent can reconstruct each item's context from pm get + pm comments + pm notes + pm files alone.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: 2026-07-04 metadata backfill pass (this audit) completed the full scope: (1) charter bodies + risk/confidence on the milestone pm-doxj and all 11 open epics — each charter records scope in/out, standing invariants, closed-children count, and the live open-children inventory; (2) full-context bodies (Context / Approach or Design / Definition of done) + risk/confidence on all 24 open leaf items; (3) dep edges wired: pm-114v blocked_by pm-8t5x + related pm-2muu, pm-bgcu related pm-2muu (singleton locks reuse the lock machinery); (4) idea promotion: pm claim --next extracted from pm-8t5x prose into tracked Feature pm-114v under pm-dj98. Verification sweep after the pass: 41/41 active items have AC + estimate + priority + body + risk + confidence; every non-container item has a parent. Comments/linked-artifact reconciliation intentionally NOT duplicated here: the 146 missing / 134 orphaned linked-file rows remain owned by pm-j8z6, terminal-item resolution backfill by pm-e9zh.

patch.value: All 41 active items (1 milestone, 11 epics, 29 leaves incl. new pm-114v) now carry body + risk + confidence on top of the pre-existing 100% AC/estimate/parent coverage; epic bodies are charters with scope, invariants, and child inventories; deps and one promoted idea (pm-114v) round out the graph.
Every active item rebuildable from pm CLI alone: body, risk, confidence, AC, estimate, parent, deps populated with real content (no placeholders).

Verified by scripted sweep post-pass: 0 items missing any of body/risk/confidence/AC/estimate/priority; parents 100% on non-container items; remaining metadata debt is scoped to pm-j8z6 (linked files) and pm-e9zh (terminal resolution evidence), both open with full bodies.
Backfill complete: full-context bodies, risk and confidence now cover every active item; context is rebuildable from the pm CLI alone (verified by sweep, 2026-07-04).
